name: Spire Inc. Depositary Shares each representing a 1/1000th interest in a share of 5.90% Series A Cumulative Redeemable Perpetual Preferred Stock
summary: Spire Inc. is a public utility holding company that provides natural gas service through its regulated utility subsidiaries. They serve homes and businesses, distributing natural gas and investing in infrastructure. The company is headquartered in St. Louis, Missouri.
